_comment: Education-feeds catalog (L7). A tiered address book of trusted feeds the self-updater harvests. Authoritative-first: only tier 'canonical' / authority 'primary' confirms a change; 'news_teacher_student' is curated secondary news on issues affecting teachers/students; the 'product_updates' layer (edtech/vendor) is OFF by default. Feeds come in two types: type='feed' (native RSS/Atom — fetched and parsed directly) and type='page' (HTML news-listing page without a feed — harvested by the page scraper in shared/feeds/feeds.py scrape_page_items(), driven by the scrape_config block). Page scrapers need site-specific selector tuning; run tools/make_feed.py --url URL to discover selectors. Standards/program changes are advisory + human-verified. Nothing fabricated.

product_updates.note: edtech/vendor product-update feeds — OFF unless a teacher opts in

feeds.label: U.S. Dept of Education — blog/news
feeds.purpose: federal education policy, funding, and program news affecting teachers and students (US DOE official blog)
feeds.note: Confirmed RSS at blog.ed.gov/feed — US DOE blog. Newsroom page: https://www.ed.gov/about/news

feeds.label: Florida Senate — calendars
feeds.purpose: Florida Senate session calendar / legislation feed (education bills, Title XLVIII); primary canonical source for FL education law
feeds.note: Candidate URL — the FL Senate tracker/rss page lists available feeds. Run tools/verify_feeds.py --url URL on an open-net machine to confirm. Try also: https://www.flsenate.gov/tracker/rss for the full list of available FL Senate RSS feeds.

feeds.label: Florida DOE — newsroom
feeds.purpose: Florida DOE program/policy announcements (state canonical source for FL K-12 education policy)
feeds.note: FLDOE does not publish a public RSS feed. This entry scrapes the news-listing page. Run tools/make_feed.py --url https://www.fldoe.org/newsroom/latest-news/ to discover actual selectors and tune scrape_config. GovDelivery email subscriptions available at fldoe.org but no RSS endpoint confirmed as of 2026-06.

scrape_config.title: h2, h3, h4, .news-title, .headline, a
scrape_config._note: Selectors are best-guess defaults — tune after running tools/make_feed.py --url against the live page

feeds.label: CPALMS — standards updates
feeds.purpose: Florida B.E.S.T./NGSSS standards repository updates — primary canonical source for FL curriculum standards
feeds.note: CPALMS has an iCPALMS app RSS reader (https://www.cpalms.org/icpalms/app_rss.aspx) but no public site-wide news RSS. Scrapes the homepage/news page for announcements. Also explore: https://www.cpalms.org/downloads for data exports. Run tools/make_feed.py --url https://www.cpalms.org/ to discover selectors.

scrape_config.title: h2, h3, h4, .title, .headline, a
scrape_config._note: Selectors are best-guess defaults — tune after running tools/make_feed.py --url against the live page

feeds.label: WIDA — news
feeds.purpose: WIDA English-language-development standards + assessment news — primary canonical source for ELD/ELL educators
feeds.subject: ELD
feeds.note: WIDA is hosted on UW-Madison (Drupal/WordPress). UW sites expose feeds at /news/feed — URL is the standard pattern, not yet confirmed by live fetch. If 404 try: https://wida.wisc.edu/rss.xml or fall back to page scraping the /news listing. Verify with tools/verify_feeds.py --url https://wida.wisc.edu/news/feed on open-net machine.

scrape_config.title: h2, h3, .title, .views-field-title
scrape_config._note: Fallback scrape config if /news/feed 404s — tune after running tools/make_feed.py --url https://wida.wisc.edu/news

feeds.label: Orange County Public Schools — newsroom
feeds.purpose: OCPS (district 48, Orange County FL) official district news/announcements affecting teachers and students
feeds.note: OCPS uses Finalsite CMS. Finalsite supports RSS but it must be enabled per-page by the district admin. Try: https://www.ocps.net/site/RSS?type=news — a common Finalsite RSS pattern. Also try checking https://www.ocps.net/94816_3 (newsroom alternate URL). Run tools/make_feed.py --url https://www.ocps.net/departments/media_relations/newsroom to discover selectors. Contact PIO@ocps.net to request an RSS feed.

scrape_config.title: .app-post-block-header, h2, h3, .fs-entry-summary-header, .title
scrape_config._note: Finalsite-specific selectors — tune after running tools/make_feed.py --url against the live OCPS newsroom. Try also the alternate newsroom URL: https://www.ocps.net/94816_3

feeds.label: Monarch Learning Academy — school news
feeds.purpose: Monarch Learning Academy (private PK-8 Christian school, College Park/Orlando FL, 1914 Edgewater Dr) school news and calendar — first private-school example
feeds.note: Small private Christian school. No public RSS or Atom feed found. The school uses a FACTS/ParentsWeb-style or basic WordPress site. Try scraping the homepage and /news or /blog paths. Check for iCal/ICS calendar export at /calendar or similar. Run tools/make_feed.py --url https://www.monarchlearningacademy.com/ to discover what news content is available. Instagram (@monarchlearningacademy) may be the primary public news channel.

scrape_config.title: h2, h3, h4, .entry-title, .post-title, .title
scrape_config._note: Generic WordPress-style selectors — run tools/make_feed.py --url against the live site to discover what's actually there. May need /news or /blog path instead of homepage.
